overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player navigates narrow streets lined with vending machines and holographic advertisements, following a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella through increasingly dense urban architecture before emerging into a plaza with massive skyscrapers.

events.description: transition from character close-up to first-person street perspective

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down rain-soaked street lined with glowing vending machines and neon signs

entered.detail: purple and red automated vending machines with bright glowing displays and Japanese text
large piles of blue garbage bags stacked along the building facade
distant blue neon sign with Japanese characters indicating a hotel

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a brief character close-up before transitioning to first-person perspective walking down a narrow, rain-soaked cyberpunk street. Neon vending machines line the left side while blue trash bags pile up on the right. The atmosphere is thick with rain and haze, illuminated by various neon signs and streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial hotel district with street vendors

events.description: begins following pedestrian with illuminated red neon umbrella

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian carrying a distinctive red glowing umbrella through the rainy commercial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt holding red neon-lit umbrella walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: white fabric canopy covering a small street vendor stall
stacked vertical holographic advertisement displays above the street

segments.scene_description: The street widens slightly as the camera moves through a more commercial area with market stalls and increasing pedestrian traffic. The camera focuses on following a pedestrian with a distinctive red neon umbrella. The blue trash bags disappear behind as the hotel sign grows larger and more prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive holographic displays and skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements
entering open plaza area with large cyan holographic billboard

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza while observing the towering buildings and massive holographic advertisements

entered.detail: giant cyan holographic sign displaying WEBA text with bright illumination
massive stacked cyberpunk apartment building with countless illuminated windows
dark glass tower with red holographic logo on the facade

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide plaza dominated by massive holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the corporate buildings before continuing forward. The street vendors and vending machines of the previous segments are replaced by monumental architecture and bright cyan holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with metal security fencing

events.description: camera moves closer to metal fence wall on right side while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow passage alongside a corrugated metal wall with graffiti

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in opposite direction through the alley

entered.detail: tall metal security fence with horizontal bars running along the alley
corrugated metal wall covered in graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow alleyway bordered by a metal fence wall on the right. The massive holographic billboards and corporate towers of the plaza are left behind as the camera navigates this more confined space. The tall residential tower now appears on the left side as the camera turns, while graffiti-covered metal walls dominate the immediate right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk alleyway that gradually opens into a busier commercial district. It begins with a brief character close-up before transitioning into a walk down a narrow street where neon vending machines and piles of blue trash bags line the hazy, rain-slicked path. As the camera advances, the claustrophobic alleyway widens into a more open commercial area filled with market stalls and increasing pedestrian traffic. The focus then shifts to follow a pedestrian carrying a distinctive red neon umbrella, while the blue trash bags recede and a prominent hotel sign grows larger in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a monumental corporate plaza into a confined, gritty urban alleyway. It begins by opening into a wide expanse dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive cyan holographic billboards, with the camera tilting upward to capture the overwhelming scale of the architecture. As the camera moves forward, the bright displays and open space of the plaza gradually recede, giving way to a more restrictive environment. The scene then shifts into a narrow alleyway bordered by a graffiti-covered metal fence on the right, leaving the corporate towers behind. Finally, the camera turns to reveal a tall residential tower on the left as it navigates the claustrophobic corridor of metal walls.
